title: The Cost of Delivery
situation: After multiple macabre deliveries, he witnesses recipients changed irrevocably and understands his artifacts enact real spiritual outcomes.
knows: Each artifact delivered carries irreversible mystical consequence
His cryptic warnings are part of the rite, not theatrics
Ordinary gifts would violate his binding and dilute the omen
does_not_know: If he serves a higher will or a curse of his own making
How many deliveries remain before completion
Whether refusal is possible without catastrophic backlash
